honest_issues: No scoreable checkpoint passed the owner gate: all raw/aggregated PCK@5 values in the before/after tables are 0.0 and all per-viewpoint gates are false.
The relabel did not move any matched original-frame keypoint by >5px; the correction signal is two added replacement full-metric15 frames, one per source.
The best_stack manifest marks court.court_unet_v2 as PENDING, not VERIFIED/promoted; I scored that current local path but did not change or promote it.

court.e4_fusion_default and court.profile_driven_cluster are not checkpoint paths and were not scoreable by evaluate_court_keypoint_owner_gate.py; they are listed as unscoreable in owner_gate_rescore_summary.json.
The trainerfix smoke checkpoints were scored for completeness because they are banked court_model_v2.pt artifacts, but they are not promotion candidates.
Closeout git status includes unrelated/concurrent dirty files outside this lane, including configs/racketsport/best_stack.json and process/body files; I did not revert or normalize them.
jsonschema is not installed in .venv, so I validated the lane-report schema structure with a manual strict top-level/key check instead.
